title: Airwallex Fuels EMEA Growth With $1.1 Billion Investment
message_html: Airwallex Fuels EMEA Growth With $1.1 Billion Investment ...
snippet: Global payments and financial platform Airwallex is investing $1.135 billion to fuel its expansion in the United Kingdom and the Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA) region over the next five years. The company will use the new investment to open in new markets, launch new products and add 100 new
